name: The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch: Behind The Gate
original_name: The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch: Behind The Gate
overview: The HISTORY Channel’s popular series The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch tracks the boldest efforts yet of ranch owner Brandon Fugal and his team to reveal the ultimate truth behind the anomalous property.

trailers.title: BIGGEST ALIEN DISCOVERIES OF 2024 | The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch
